I have no excuse on taking so long. I couldn't find a song for music mania so I was about to just, not have one, but then I just played my liked songs on shuffle, and found 3S' so. I guess it works. Anyway, I am shit at writing jealousy, so I did my best!

Plot: During a fight with Jabber, both parties taking hits, he starts to flirt with you to get Zanka annoyed.

Left the relationship ambiguous! Can be either in a relationship with Zanka, or be friends where he has a crush on you!
creator: Amorflos
